default.description: Pagination 'Rows per page' label text color - standard body text for good readability
Rows per page dropdown default background - white for clear contrast

hover.description: Rows per page dropdown hover background - light gray for feedback

focused.description: Rows per page dropdown focused background - white

disabled.description: Rows per page dropdown disabled background - light gray

default.description: Rows per page dropdown default border - standard neutral border

hover.description: Rows per page dropdown hover border - darker gray for emphasis

focused.description: Rows per page dropdown focused border - primary blue for focus indication

disabled.description: Rows per page dropdown disabled border - light gray

default.description: Rows per page dropdown default text - dark for readability

disabled.description: Rows per page dropdown disabled text - muted gray

default.description: Rows per page dropdown chevron icon - medium gray

hover.description: Rows per page dropdown hover chevron icon - medium gray

focused.description: Rows per page dropdown focused chevron icon - medium gray

disabled.description: Rows per page dropdown disabled chevron icon - light gray

default.description: Item range text color (e.g., '1-20 of 212') - standard body text for clarity
Pagination container background - transparent to inherit from parent context

md.description: 13px medium weight font for medium 'Rows per page' label

sm.description: 11px medium weight font for small 'Rows per page' label

md.description: 14px regular weight font for medium rows per page dropdown value

sm.description: 14px regular weight font for small rows per page dropdown value

md.description: 13px medium weight font for medium item range text (e.g., '1-20 of 212')

sm.description: 11px medium weight font for small item range text

dropdown.description: 4px border radius for rows per page dropdown

md.description: 16px gap between rows-per-page section and pagination controls (medium size)

sm.description: 16px gap between rows-per-page section and pagination controls (small size)

md.description: 4px gap between elements within rows-per-page section (medium size)

sm.description: 4px gap between elements within rows-per-page section (small size)

md.description: No horizontal padding for medium pagination container - relies on parent spacing

sm.description: No horizontal padding for small pagination container - relies on parent spacing

md.description: No vertical padding for medium pagination container - relies on parent spacing

sm.description: No vertical padding for small pagination container - relies on parent spacing

md.description: 64px width for medium rows per page dropdown (accommodates typical values like '10', '20', '50')

sm.description: 56px width for small rows per page dropdown

md.description: 32px height for medium rows per page dropdown

sm.description: 24px height for small rows per page dropdown

md.description: 8px horizontal padding for medium rows per page dropdown

sm.description: 8px horizontal padding for small rows per page dropdown

md.description: 6px vertical padding for medium rows per page dropdown

sm.description: 6px vertical padding for small rows per page dropdown

md.description: 32px minimum height for medium pagination container (aligns with button heights)

sm.description: 24px minimum height for small pagination container (aligns with button heights)

md.description: 16px chevron icon size for medium rows per page dropdown

sm.description: 12px chevron icon size for small rows per page dropdown

structure.description: Complete pagination component consists of three main sections arranged horizontally

rows-per-page.description: Left section with 'Rows per page' label, dropdown selector, and optional item range text (e.g., '1-20 of 212')
rows-per-page.use-case: Controls how many items are displayed per page in tables or lists

pagination-controls.description: Right section with pagination navigation (Previous, page numbers, Next)

full.description: Complete pagination with all elements: rows-per-page selector, item range, and page controls
full.use-case: Use for data tables where users need control over rows displayed and page navigation

controls-only.description: Only pagination controls without rows-per-page section
controls-only.use-case: Use when row count is fixed or controlled elsewhere

with-range.description: Includes item range text (e.g., '1-20 of 212') to show current position in dataset
with-range.use-case: Use when users need context about their position in a large dataset

minimal.description: Minimal pagination with just controls, no rows-per-page or range text
minimal.use-case: Use for simple list pagination where dataset size is small or context is clear

responsive.description: Pagination adapts to container width by adjusting spacing and potentially collapsing controls

breakpoints.desktop: Full layout with all elements visible
breakpoints.tablet: May collapse to show fewer page numbers
breakpoints.mobile: Consider using collapsed or simple pagination variant

dropdown.description: Dropdown selector for number of rows to display per page
dropdown.interaction: Clicking dropdown shows menu with available options. Selecting a value refreshes the table/list with new row count.
dropdown.persistence: Selected value should persist across page navigations within the same session

item-range.description: Read-only text showing current item range and total count (e.g., '1-20 of 212')
item-range.calculation: Start = (currentPage - 1) * rowsPerPage + 1; End = min(currentPage * rowsPerPage, totalItems)
item-range.updates: Automatically updates when page changes or rows-per-page changes

accessibility.keyboard-navigation: All interactive elements (dropdown, buttons) must be keyboard accessible (Tab, Enter, Space)
accessibility.screen-readers: Provide ARIA labels for page buttons, announce page changes, and describe current page position
accessibility.focus-management: Clear focus indicators on all interactive elements
accessibility.announcements: Announce page changes and item range updates to screen readers

loading-states.description: When data is loading, disable all controls and show loading indicator
loading-states.controls: Disable Previous/Next buttons and page numbers during data fetch
loading-states.feedback: Consider showing skeleton state or loading spinner near pagination controls

ring.description: Focus ring for rows per page dropdown - primary blue glow

shadow.description: Subtle shadow for rows per page dropdown

placement.description: Pagination is typically placed at the bottom of tables or lists
placement.alignment: Usually center-aligned or right-aligned within container
placement.spacing: Provide adequate spacing (16-24px) from content above

tips: Disable controls during data fetch to prevent multiple requests
Preserve page number when possible after data refresh

empty-states.behavior: Hide or disable pagination when there are no items or only one page of items
empty-states.minimum-threshold: Consider showing pagination only when totalItems > rowsPerPage

url-sync.description: Sync pagination state with URL for shareable links
url-sync.parameters: Include page number and rows-per-page in URL query params (e.g., ?page=2&rows=20)
url-sync.benefits: Allows users to bookmark or share specific pages, improves SEO for indexed content
